name: url-trace-extension
description: Chrome extension companion to the url-trace CLI: captures real network requests via chrome.webRequest and runs them through the same Go pipeline (compiled to WASM) that the CLI uses.

scripts.build:wasm: GOOS=js GOARCH=wasm go build -o public/url-trace.wasm ../wasm && cp "$(go env GOROOT)/lib/wasm/wasm_exec.js" public/wasm_exec.js
scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && npm run build:js
